message:
feat(cli): add --summarize flag to ntm kill command

Allow generating a session summary before killing by passing the
--summarize flag. This captures session state/progress documentation
before panes are destroyed.

Changes:
- Add Summarize field to SessionKillInput struct
- Add --summarize flag to kill command
- Wire summarize parameter through runKill and kernel input
- Import summary package for summary generation

Usage: ntm kill myproject --summarize

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
